scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-meditations/shared && npm run build -w @ai-meditations/sandbox && npm run build -w @ai-meditations/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ai-meditations/shared && npm run build -w @ai-meditations/sandbox && npm run typecheck -w @ai-meditations/server
scripts.test: npm run build -w @ai-meditations/shared && npm run test -w @ai-meditations/sandbox && npm run test -w @ai-meditations/server
